data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of referral status tracking for customers. However, the evidence does not provide any concrete data or endpoints that confirm this tracking functionality. The linked use case mentions referral tracking but lacks specific evidence of how the status of referrals is tracked, leading to a clear gap in the validation of this requirement.
gaps: No evidence of referral status tracking for customers.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Verify referral status tracking
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Check if the system tracks and displays the status of referrals for customers.
